name: Tomato Stack Ups
recipeIngredient: 6 slices Swiss cheese, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the eggplant with seasoned salt.
2. Fry in the butter in a skillet until just tender.
3. Cut six pieces of heavy-duty aluminum foil (each measuring 6 inches).
4. Place one slice of eggplant on each piece of foil.
5. Top each with a slice of tomato and half a slice of cheese.
6. Cover with another slice of eggplant and then another slice of cheese.
7. Fold the foil up and over, sealing loosely.
8. Place on the grill over medium coals until heated through, about 5 to 10 minutes.
9. Serves 6
